series_metadata.series_title: ORIGINAL FOREIGN APPLICATION - FIRST FAIL & FAILURE TO APPEAR
series_metadata.series_description: This file consists of application forms of applicants for the foreign real estate dealer or sales license exam who on their first attempt at the exam do not receive a passing score or who fail to appear for the examination. THIS SERIES NEED BE OBSOLETE. IT WAS REPLACED BY 800-0700.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: records exam take or original exam date
